title: Epic Additions
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60d6cfc0ca4154304d01ed51011cad4e2201bc2.png) Dimensions, Weapons, Enchantments, and more!

**Pocket Dimension**
Inspired by the Spectre Dimension from Random Things, the Pocket Dimension houses private Pocket Cells for every player on a server. These Pocket Cells are easily and excusively accessed from anywhere using a Pocket Dimension Key, and guarantee the security of your stuff.
![Pocket Cells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FjC2Bm1c/images/d85dc7e7952753740009c52f10a389f76fb9c57d.png) To exit the Pocket Dimension, the key must simply be used again. It will bring its owner back to where they left off before entering the Pocket Dimension.

**Legendary Weapons**
![Staff of the Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FjC2Bm1c/images/e0452fdc14e686b94898aca769528b67e846ff2f.png) Defeating Minecraft's bosses deserve some better rewards, don't they?

**Legendary Enchantments**
- Soul Tied: Retain enchanted item upon death (Can be added to anything) - Soft Stepping: Silences certain vibrations to help combat the Warden... only found in the Ancient Cities.
Above are just highlights, view full list of additions [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-additions/pages/home)!

FAQ:
Q: Port to version __?
A: If 1.18 or higher, there is a good chance of an eventual port. Ports will be done once beta phase is complete, and prioritize the latest and most used versions.

Q: Port to Fabric?
A: Eventually this is in the playbook, but it will take some time as this mod makes use of many Forge features.

Q: Port to NeoForge?
A: Once the beta phase is completed (i.e. major bugs stomped), a NeoForge port will be made.
